channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Austin failed to tell Congress or the White House about his health problems as required, report says
item.description: Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin didn't inform Congress or the White House as required when he was incapacitated due to treatment for prostate cancer or when complications worsened his condition last year.
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp And Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Trump HHS official tapped to be RFK Jr's chief of staff: report
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's transition team reportedly tapped a former senior health official from the president-elect's first term and a friend to top Trump loyalists to be Robert F. Kennedy Jr's chief of staff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michelle Obama signals she’s done with Trump
item.description: Michelle Obama is done with President-elect Donald Trump, if her decision to skip the inauguration means anything.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Key takeaways from Pete Hegseth's fiery confirmation hearing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Pete Hegseth, President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for defense secretary, publicly faced senators for the first time after weeks of questions from Democrats — and praise from Republicans — about his “unconventional” resume.
item.dc:creator: MARY CLARE JALONICK and LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee AG optimistic about SCOTUS case after 'radical gender ideology' reversal in lower court
item.description: Tennessee Attorney General Jonathan Skrmetti, optimistic after a Kentucky court ruling reversing Biden's Title IX, eyes potential success in his Supreme Court gender case.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Few US adults confident Justice Department and FBI will act fairly under Trump, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for attorney general, Pam Bondi, prepares for questioning from senators on Wednesday, only about 2 in 10 U.S.
item.dc:creator: AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden promised to turn the page on Trump. Now he's being replaced by him
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Joe Biden promised nothing short of a national exorcism when he took office. He wanted to “restore the soul" of the country and prove that Donald Trump was only a footnote in the American story, not its next chapter.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Texas anti-pornography law that challengers say violates free-speech rights
item.description: A Texas anti-pornography law is going before the Supreme Court in a collision of free speech rights, regulation of online content and how to protect children.
item.dc:creator: Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump attorney general nominee Pam Bondi to testify before Judiciary Committee
item.description: Trump's attorney general pick, Pam Bondi, to face questioning from the Senate Judiciary Committee on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: County Board of Supervisors votes to hold special election to fill District 1 seat
item.description: In a swift and unanimous vote, the County Board of Supervisors has agreed to a special election to fill the vacancy left behind by Nora Vargas.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Biden moves to lift state sponsor of terrorism designation for Cuba, part of deal to free prisoners
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden notified Congress of his intent to lift the U.S. designation of Cuba as a state sponsor of terrorism, the White House announced, as part of a deal facilitated by the Catholic Church to free political prisoners on the island. Senior U.S.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, COLLEEN LONG, MATTHEW LEE and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House barrels toward fight over placing conditions on California fire aid
item.description: The House is barreling toward a contentious debate over disaster relief for California as many — but not all — Republicans call for conditions to be placed on the assistance, an idea Democrats are soundly rejecting. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Biden announces 2 new national monuments in California after wildfires scuttled previous event
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In an announcement postponed by the Los Angeles wildfires, President Joe Biden on Tuesday designated two sites in California as national monuments that will honor Native American tribes while shielding picturesque mountains and deserts from mining and energy development.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speaker Johnson orders US Capitol flags raised to full height for Trump's inauguration
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson on Tuesday ordered that flags at the U.S. Capitol be raised to their full height on Inauguration Day, pausing a 30-day flag-lowering order following the death of former President Jimmy Carter.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: These 2 Democrats voted for House Republicans' bill to bar transgender athletes from girls sports
item.description: Reps. Vicente Gonzalez and Henry Cuellar, both of Texas, were the only Democrats to side with Republicans on Tuesday to pass legislation meant to bar transgender athletes from competing in girls and women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin’s governor creates new violence-prevention office in wake of school shooting
item.description: Wisconsin’s Democratic governor on Tuesday created a new office dedicated to preventing gun violence, a month after a school shooting not far from the state Capitol and an idea that drew immediate opposition from Republicans who said it was misguided.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: What Americans think about Pete Hegseth, Trump's defense secretary pick
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Pete Hegseth faced an important test in his fiery confirmation hearing on Tuesday — but he didn't just have to prove himself to the senators who immediately began sparring over his nomination as defense secretary.
item.dc:creator: LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge: DFL candidate’s election stands for Shakopee-area Minnesota House seat
item.description: State Rep. Brad Tabke, a DFL Minnesota House incumbent who narrowly won reelection, should be able to begin a new term, a judge ruled Tuesday — despite a GOP election challenge centering on a pool of ballots that were cast but never counted.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson and MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: How Trump's Greenland demands could impact Ozempic costs
item.description: President-elect Trump's threat to tariff Denmark if it resists his acquisition plans for the island territory of Greenland could disrupt one export that is wildly popular in America: Ozempic.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, NewsNation

item.title: Special counsel in Hunter Biden case denounces president for criticism of the probe
item.description: In a final report on his investigation, special counsel David Weiss said President Biden's criticism "undermines the very foundation of what makes America's justice system fair and equitable.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Las Vegas 'Preview Mania 2025' set for Thursday with a nod to WWE
item.description: About 1,500 business leaders are expected to attend Las Vegas Preview on Thursday at the Las Vegas Convention Center to hear about the trends that are shaping economic growth.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DeSantis calls special session to implement Trump immigration crackdown
item.description: “I’m going to call the Legislature into special session starting the week of Jan. 27,” DeSantis said at a press conference Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Judge explains why he swore in nearly all House DFLers early
item.description: Retired Hennepin County Chief Judge Kevin Burke presided over the swearing-in ceremony and joined Morning Edition host Cathy Wurzer Monday to talk about the hushed affair.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Senate District 60 special election
item.description: Minnesota Senate District 60 is holding a special election to fill the vacancy left by DFL Sen. Kari Dziedzic who died last month.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Preview: Minnesota’s 94th legislative session
item.description: Less than a day remains until Minnesota lawmakers begin the 94th legislative session. And there’s a lot that is still not resolved between the DFL and Republicans, whose 67-67 tie in the House of Representatives has gotten messy.
item.dc:creator: Nina Moini, Dana Ferguson, and Alanna Elder, MPR News

item.title: Key Republican says he will support Gabbard as Trump DNI pick
item.description: Sen. James Lankford, R-Okla., said in a Sunday interview that he will support President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for director of national intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: New rule could slash nicotine levels in tobacco products
item.description: The Biden administration is poised to try to lower the amount of nicotine in tobacco products, an eleventh-hour effort that’s been years in the making.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Exit interview: DOT Sec. Buttigieg on infrastructure act and the road ahead
item.description: In an exit interview with All Things Considered, DOT Secretary Pete Buttigieg reflects on the Biden administration's infrastructure act and why it didn't resonate with some voters.
item.dc:creator: Scott Detrow, Avery Keatley, and Adam Raney, MPR News

item.title: People are rushing to install solar panels before Trump becomes President
item.description: Potential rooftop solar customers and installers worry the incoming Trump administration might try to eliminate a 30 percent federal tax credit. Some customers plan to install sooner because of that and solar companies are changing their business plans.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Brady, MPR News

item.title: As Legislature prepares for new session, rifts between parties show a partisan divide
item.description: The Minnesota Legislature will gavel-in a new session on Jan. 14 at noon, and MPR’s politics team is at the Capitol to cover it all. MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guests talk about the 2025 legislative session.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Nevada's Cortez Masto to reintroduce bill to fund fight against wildfires
item.description: In the wake of the devastating California wildfires, Nevada Democratic Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto plans to reintroduce a proposal in Congress to better fund fire departments, interagency coordination and recovery efforts.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s bid to delay sentencing in his New York hush money case
item.description: A divided Supreme Court on Thursday rejected President-elect Donald Trump’s bid to delay his sentencing in his hush money case in New York.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, MICHAEL HILL and MICHAEL R. SISAK Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
